_doc: Scenario manifest for the harness. Each scenario externalizes the caller script (one turn per line in the referenced .jsonl), the seeded_fact the judge scores recall against, the clean-ledger identity/objective the suggeritore side starts from, and optional console-only recall_markers. The last line of every script is treated as the recall turn. See ROADMAP.md items #2/#3.

scenarios.name: Watch delivery (grandmother)
scenarios.seeded_fact: the watch must arrive before the 20th for grandson Luca's graduation, delivered to sig.ra Pina interno 3
scenarios.identity: you are ShopDemo's phone support agent
scenarios.objective: help the caller with their existing order

scenarios.name: Refund with deadline (broken blender)
scenarios.seeded_fact: the caller wants to return order 8829 (a blender that arrived broken) and needs the refund processed before the 30th because they are moving abroad
scenarios.identity: you are ShopDemo's phone support agent
scenarios.objective: help the caller with their existing order

scenarios.name: Delivery address change (home to office)
scenarios.seeded_fact: the caller changed delivery of order 5567 from home to their office at via Marconi 12, and it must arrive on a weekday because no one is at the office on weekends
scenarios.identity: you are ShopDemo's phone support agent
scenarios.objective: help the caller with their existing order

scenarios.name: Long call (coffee machine wedding gift)
scenarios.seeded_fact: the coffee machine (order 3310) is a wedding gift for the caller's daughter Sofia, must arrive before the 12th, delivered to the concierge Marco
scenarios.identity: you are ShopDemo's phone support agent
scenarios.objective: help the caller with their existing order

scenarios.name: StudierAI oral exam (matematica)
scenarios.seeded_fact: at the start the student Marco said he had reviewed derivatives and the theorems of Rolle and Lagrange well but had NOT reviewed integrals; the exam has so far covered derivatives and the mean-value theorems (Rolle, Lagrange)
scenarios.identity: you are an Italian university professor conducting a student's oral exam (esame orale)
scenarios.objective: quiz the student on the study material and assess them, tracking what has already been covered
